race.comment: REGAL GENT (11) resumes off a string of placings at the provincials. Has prepared with three jumpouts and rates right up to this. He looks ready to go this time around. Tipping he does the job first time out. HOLLERASAUROUS (7) debuts for a top metro barn and has won both his most recent jumpouts. Has an inside barrier and Currie is booked. A bold run is on the cards. BLACKLIP (4) has ability but has been spoiling things with slow offs. Draws handier today and deserves each way consideration. CRAZY TOWN (6) debuts and has impressed in the lead-ups. Has the rail and the blinkers applied. Meech sticks from the latest jumpouts and he has to be kept safe.
